name: Intel Core i5 14600KF 14th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 14600KF 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 14600KF 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 14600KF 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.62,500. This unlocked 14th Gen CPU features a hybrid design with 14 cores (6 Performance + 8 Efficient) and 20 threads, boosting up to around 5.3 GHz for strong gaming and multitasking performance, and requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics. Built on the LGA 1700 platform, it supports both DDR4 and DDR5
